translations.en: I'm going to the conference today.
translations.fr: Je vais à la conférence aujourd'hui.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi đi dự hội nghị.
translations.nl: Ik ga vandaag naar de conferentie.
translations.hi: मैं आज सम्मेलन में जा रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: I dag skal jeg på konferanse.
translations.id: Hari ini saya pergi ke konferensi.
translations.da: Jeg skal til konference i dag.
translations.ja: 今日はカンファレンスに行きます。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the finite verb.
Finite verb (1st sg, present indicative); main predicate of the clause.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb, indicating the day.
Preposition contracted with definite article (“zu der”); governs dative; introduces the PP.
Feminine noun; dative singular as complement of the preposition “zur”.

sentences.target: Die Konferenz beginnt gleich im großen Saal.
sentences.reading: /diː kɔnfɛˈʁɛnt͡s bəˈɡɪnt ɡlaɪ̯ç ɪm ˈɡʁoːsən zaːl/

translations.de: Die Konferenz beginnt gleich im großen Saal.
translations.ipa: /diː kɔnfɛˈʁɛnt͡s bəˈɡɪnt ɡlaɪ̯ç ɪm ˈɡʁoːsən zaːl/
translations.en: The conference starts soon in the big hall.
translations.es: La conferencia empieza pronto en el auditorio principal.
translations.fr: La conférence commence bientôt dans la grande salle.
translations.it: La conferenza inizia tra poco nella sala principale.
translations.zh-Hans: 会议马上在大礼堂开始。
translations.ru: Конференция скоро начнётся в большом зале.
translations.pt: A conferência começa em breve no salão principal.
translations.he: הכנס מתחיל עוד מעט באולם הגדול.
translations.vi: Hội nghị sắp bắt đầu ở hội trường lớn.
translations.ar: سيبدأ المؤتمر قريبًا في القاعة الكبيرة.
translations.nl: De conferentie begint zo in de grote zaal.
translations.uk: Конференція скоро почнеться у великій залі.
translations.hu: A konferencia hamarosan kezdődik a nagyteremben.
translations.hi: सम्मेलन जल्द ही बड़े सभागार में शुरू होगा.
translations.pl: Konferencja wkrótce rozpocznie się w dużej sali.
translations.el: Το συνέδριο ξεκινά σύντομα στη μεγάλη αίθουσα.
translations.nb: Konferansen begynner snart i den store salen.
translations.id: Konferensi segera dimulai di aula besar.
translations.sv: Konferensen börjar snart i stora salen.
translations.ro: Conferința începe în curând în sala mare.
translations.cs: Konference brzy začne ve velkém sále.
translations.da: Konferencen begynder snart i den store sal.
translations.ja: カンファレンスはもうすぐ大ホールで始まります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative feminine singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Feminine noun; nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite verb (3rd sg, present indicative); main predicate.
Temporal adverb meaning ‘right away/soon’; modifies the verb.
Preposition contracted with article (“in dem”); governs dative; introduces a locative PP.
Attributive adjective; dative masculine singular agreement with “Saal”; modifies the noun.
Masculine noun; dative singular as complement of the preposition “im”.

sentences.target: Wir treffen uns nach der Konferenz im Café.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈtʁɛfən ʊns naːx deːɐ̯ kɔnfɛˈʁɛnt͡s ɪm kaˈfeː/

translations.de: Wir treffen uns nach der Konferenz im Café.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈtʁɛfən ʊns naːx deːɐ̯ kɔnfɛˈʁɛnt͡s ɪm kaˈfeː/
translations.en: We'll meet at the café after the conference.
translations.es: Nos vemos en el café después de la conferencia.
translations.fr: On se retrouve au café après la conférence.
translations.it: Ci vediamo al bar dopo la conferenza.
translations.zh-Hans: 会议结束后我们在咖啡馆见面。
translations.yue: 會議之後我哋喺咖啡店見面。
translations.pt: Vamos nos encontrar no café depois da conferência.
translations.vi: Sau hội nghị chúng ta gặp nhau ở quán cà phê.
translations.nl: We zien elkaar na de conferentie in het café.
translations.hu: A konferencia után találkozunk a kávézóban.
translations.hi: सम्मेलन के बाद हम कैफ़े में मिलेंगे.
translations.pl: Spotkamy się w kawiarni po konferencji.
translations.el: Θα συναντηθούμε στο καφέ μετά το συνέδριο.
translations.nb: Vi møtes på kafé etter konferansen.
translations.id: Setelah konferensi, kita bertemu di kafe.
translations.sv: Vi ses på kafé efter konferensen.
translations.ro: Ne vedem la cafenea după conferință.
translations.cs: Po konferenci se sejdeme v kavárně.
translations.da: Vi mødes på café efter konferencen.
translations.ja: 会議のあとでカフェで会いましょう。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person plural nominative personal pronoun; subject of the finite verb.
Finite verb (1st pl, present indicative); main predicate.
Reflexive personal pronoun; accusative plural; direct object coreferential with the subject.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a temporal PP.
Definite article; dative feminine singular with “Konferenz”; determiner in the PP.
Feminine noun; dative singular; complement of the preposition “nach”.
Preposition contracted with article (“in dem”); governs dative; introduces a locative PP.
Neuter noun; dative singular as complement of the preposition “im”; place of meeting.

sentences.target: Lisa präsentiert gleich auf der Konferenz.

translations.de: Lisa präsentiert gleich auf der Konferenz.
translations.en: Lisa is presenting soon at the conference.
translations.es: Lisa presentará pronto en la conferencia.
translations.fr: Lisa va bientôt présenter à la conférence.
translations.it: Lisa presenterà tra poco alla conferenza.
translations.zh-Hans: 丽莎马上要在会议上做报告。
translations.yue: Lisa 快喺會議上做演講。
translations.ru: Лиза скоро будет выступать на конференции.
translations.pt: Lisa vai apresentar daqui a pouco na conferência.
translations.he: ליסה עומדת להציג עוד מעט בכנס.
translations.vi: Lisa sắp thuyết trình tại hội nghị.
translations.ar: ليزا ستقدم عرضًا قريبًا في المؤتمر.
translations.nl: Lisa presenteert straks op de conferentie.
translations.hi: लीसा जल्द ही सम्मेलन में प्रस्तुति देगी.
translations.pl: Lisa wkrótce wygłosi prezentację na konferencji.
translations.el: Η Λίζα θα παρουσιάσει σύντομα στο συνέδριο.
translations.nb: Lisa skal snart presentere på konferansen.
translations.id: Lisa sebentar lagi akan presentasi di konferensi.
translations.sv: Lisa ska snart presentera på konferensen.
translations.ro: Lisa va prezenta în curând la conferință.
translations.ja: リサはもうすぐカンファレンスで発表します。
